  • Howdy, admin
    • adminneverstrangersEdit Profile

Meet your new date  friend .

Book Your Slot
Sign Up

Now in Singapore, Kuala Lumpur, Manila, Bangkok, Hong Kong, Cebu and Ho Chi Minh.

We all start as Strangers.

Why Never Strangers?

Never Strangers is more than just a social mixer, we are bringing back the joys of connecting with people organically.

Say goodbye to online apps! With a little help from us, we’ll find your ideal match at a mixer*. We all start as strangers until someone shows up with ‘Hello’.

Featured in

How it Works

1) Sign Up

Register an account here. All attendees are vetted through us to make sure that everyone is coming for the right reasons. An email will be sent to you if you fit the demographics of the mixers.

2) Book your Slot

Once your account is approved, you can choose and book your preferred mixer type and date!

3) Turn up at the Mixer

Fill up the questionnaire at at the party and the algorithm will find your optimal match, based on relationship science, AI, and Nobel Prize-winning economics.

4) Partner Reveal

The most exciting part of the night. Matches will be revealed through a link sent to your mobile number. Let the countdown begin!

Got a question?
What is Never Strangers?

Never Stranger is a social mixer that introduces a new way to meet new people, be it a date or a friend. We’re bringing back the joy of meeting people organically with a little help of technology. It’s going to be a fun one with everyone matching up with their new date (or new best friend) using a program that will help you find YOUR best match at the party. It’s relationship sciences, trust me.

 
What is the age range of the social mixers?

The age demographic depends on the party we’re hosting. If you fit the demographic, we’ll send you an invite! The minimum age is 21.

How big are the mixers?

The mixers cater to a variety of group sizes, accommodating anywhere from 40 to 100 guests, with the party size tailored to the capacity of the venue.

How do get I get invited?

Sign up for an account here, our team goes through every submission to make sure that everyone is coming for the right reasons. After your account is approved, you can book any upcoming events around you.

Can anyone go to the social mixers?

The social mixer is strictly by invite only. All attendees have to be vetted through us to ensure that everyone is coming for the right reasons. This is to ensure everyone’s safety and genuine intentions for coming. Guests not registered will be denied entry at the event.

Am I guaranteed a match?

The algorithm will do its best to match each all the participants. However, we cannot control the compatibility of everyone and whether there are no-shows, so match distribution may be affected, and there is a slight possibility of not having a match at all. Don’t worry, non-matches (excluding friend matches) are invited to future events complimentary!*

*Never Strangers reserves the right to modify the terms and conditions of the complimentary invite at any time due to unforeseen or uncontrollable circumstances.

Is there a fee I need to pay?

Yes, the event is ticketed to cover the cost of the venue rental, manpower and all other logistics. A lot of work goes into making this happen!

Join a Mixer

64SELECT wp_posts.ID
FROM wp_posts
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta
ON ( wp_posts.ID = wp_postmeta.post_id )
WHERE 1=1
AND ( ( wp_postmeta.meta_key = '_elementor_template_type'
AND wp_postmeta.meta_value = 'landing-page' ) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'e-landing-page'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status <> 'trash'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'auto-draft'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_posts.post_date DESC
LIMIT 0, 1

188SELECT wp_posts.ID
FROM wp_posts
WHERE 1=1
AND wp_posts.post_parent = 63
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'page'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish'))
ORDER BY wp_posts.post_title ASC
LIMIT 0, 1

202SELECT wp_posts.*
FROM wp_posts
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta
ON ( wp_posts.ID = wp_postmeta.post_id )
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta AS mt1
ON ( wp_posts.ID = mt1.post_id )
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_postmeta.meta_key = '_elementor_priority'
AND ( ( mt1.meta_key = '_elementor_location'
AND mt1.meta_value = 'elementor_head' ) ) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'elementor_snippet'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_postmeta.meta_value+0 ASC

206SELECT wp_posts.*
FROM wp_posts
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta
ON ( wp_posts.ID = wp_postmeta.post_id )
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta AS mt1
ON ( wp_posts.ID = mt1.post_id )
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_postmeta.meta_key = '_elementor_priority'
AND ( ( mt1.meta_key = '_elementor_location'
AND mt1.meta_value = 'elementor_body_start' ) ) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'elementor_snippet'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID

215SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_comments.comment_ID
FROM wp_comments
LEFT JOIN wp_posts AS wp_posts_to_exclude_reviews
ON comment_post_ID = wp_posts_to_exclude_reviews.ID
WHERE ( ( comment_approved = '1' )
OR ( user_id = 1
AND comment_approved = '0' ) )
AND comment_post_ID = 63
AND comment_parent = 0
AND comment_type != 'order_note'
AND comment_type != 'webhook_delivery'
AND comment_type != 'action_log'
AND wp_posts_to_exclude_reviews.post_type NOT IN ('product')
ORDER BY wp_comments.comment_date_gmt ASC, wp_comments.comment_ID ASC

224SELECT wp_posts.*
FROM wp_posts
LEFT JOIN wp_term_relationships
ON (wp_posts.ID = wp_term_relationships.object_id)
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_term_relationships.term_taxonomy_id IN (52) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'nav_menu_item'

GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_posts.menu_order ASC

231SELECT wp_posts.*
FROM wp_posts
LEFT JOIN wp_term_relationships
ON (wp_posts.ID = wp_term_relationships.object_id)
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_term_relationships.term_taxonomy_id IN (55) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'nav_menu_item'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_posts.menu_order ASC

Plugin: elementor-pro 80 0.0004
233SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS wp_posts.ID
FROM wp_posts
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta
ON ( wp_posts.ID = wp_postmeta.post_id )
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta AS mt1
ON ( wp_posts.ID = mt1.post_id )
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_postmeta.meta_key = '_elementor_template_type'
AND ( ( mt1.meta_key = '_elementor_template_type'
AND mt1.meta_value = 'popup' ) ) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'elementor_library'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status <> 'trash'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'auto-draft'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'spam'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'jp-temp-feedback'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'sent'
AND wp_posts.post_status <> 'leads'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_posts.post_date DESC
LIMIT 0, 1
  1. WP_Query->get_posts()
    wp-includes/class-wp-query.php:3419
  2. WP_Query->query()
    wp-includes/class-wp-query.php:3949
  3. WP_Query->__construct()
    wp-includes/class-wp-query.php:4081
  4. ElementorPro\M\P\Module->has_popups()

  15. get_footer()
    wp-includes/general-template.php:92

237SELECT DISTINCT t.term_id, tr.object_id
FROM wp_terms AS t
INNER JOIN wp_term_taxonomy AS tt
ON t.term_id = tt.term_id

ON tr.term_taxonomy_id = tt.term_taxonomy_id

ORDER BY t.name ASC

241SELECT wp_posts.*
FROM wp_posts
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta
ON ( wp_posts.ID = wp_postmeta.post_id )
INNER JOIN wp_postmeta AS mt1
ON ( wp_posts.ID = mt1.post_id )
WHERE 1=1
AND ( wp_postmeta.meta_key = '_elementor_priority'
AND ( ( mt1.meta_key = '_elementor_location'
AND mt1.meta_value = 'elementor_body_end' ) ) )
AND wp_posts.post_type = 'elementor_snippet'
AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish'))
GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
ORDER BY wp_postmeta.meta_value+0 ASC

Capability Checks

For performance reasons, this panel is not enabled by default. To enable it, add the following code to your wp-config.php file:

define( 'QM_ENABLE_CAPS_PANEL', true );

Doing it Wrong

MessageCallerComponent
Function _load_textdomain_just_in_time was called incorrectly. Translation loading for the pixelpiernyc domain was triggered too early. This is usually an indicator for some code in the plugin or theme running too early. Translations should be loaded at the init action or later. (This message was added in version 6.7.0.)

Settings

Authentication

You can set an authentication cookie which allows you to view Query Monitor output when you’re not logged in, or when you’re logged in as a different user.

Authentication cookie is set

Editor

You can set your editor here, so that when you click on stack trace links the file opens in your editor.

Appearance

Your browser color scheme is respected by default. You can override it here.

Configuration

The following PHP constants can be defined in your wp-config.php file in order to control the behavior of Query Monitor:

QM_DB_EXPENSIVE
If an individual database query takes longer than this time to execute, it's considered "slow" and triggers a warning.
Default value: 0.05
QM_DISABLED
Disable Query Monitor entirely.
Default value: false
QM_DISABLE_ERROR_HANDLER
Disable the handling of PHP errors.
Default value: false
QM_ENABLE_CAPS_PANEL
Enable the Capability Checks panel.
Default value: false
QM_HIDE_CORE_ACTIONS
Hide WordPress core on the Hooks & Actions panel.
Default value: false
QM_HIDE_SELF
Hide Query Monitor itself from various panels. Set to false if you want to see how Query Monitor hooks into WordPress.
Default value: true
QM_NO_JQUERY
Don't specify jQuery as a dependency of Query Monitor. If jQuery isn't enqueued then Query Monitor will still operate, but with some reduced functionality.
Default value: false
QM_SHOW_ALL_HOOKS
In the Hooks & Actions panel, show every hook that has an action or filter attached (instead of every action hook that fired during the request).
Default value: false
QM_DB_SYMLINK
Allow the wp-content/db.php file symlink to be put into place during activation. Set to false to prevent the symlink creation.
Default value: true
